name: test_tallying
description:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:
1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
   provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
Verification:
- Tally counts match expected values after each step.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:

  1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
    provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
  2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
    Verification:
  • Tally counts match expected values after each step.
statusMessage:
playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="Denis Newton")
statusTrace:
setup_fixed_child = {<Vaccine.SEQUIRUS: 'Cell-based Trivalent Influenza Vaccine Seqirus'>: 'ABC123', <Vaccine.FLUENZ: 'Fluenz'>: 'ABC123'}
sessions_page = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7f2cb64e01a0>
nurse_consent_wizard_page = <mavis.test.pages.nurse_consent.NurseConsentWizardPage object at 0x7f2cb64e02f0>
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Guy', last_name='WILKINS', nhs_number='9026338864', address=('Studio 70', 'Jayne divide', '....com'), Parent(full_name='Hollie Austin', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='dfox@example.org')))]}
schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Westmorland School', urn='132828', site=None), School(name='All Saints Catholic College', urn='1...chool(name='Willoughby Academy', urn='147414', site=None), School(name="Churcher's College", urn='116579', site=None)]}

    @issue("MAV-1669")
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_tallying(
        setup_fixed_child,
        sessions_page,
        nurse_consent_wizard_page,
        children,
        schools,
    ):
        """
        Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
        Steps:
        1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
           provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
        2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
        Verification:
        - Tally counts match expected values after each step.
        """
        child = children[Programme.FLU][0]
        batch_name = setup_fixed_child[Vaccine.FLUENZ]
        school = schools[Programme.FLU][0]
    
        tally_totals = sessions_page.get_all_totals(Programme.FLU)
        assert tally_totals[TallyCategory.NO_RESPONSE] > 0
    
        sessions_page.click_consent_tab()
        sessions_page.navigate_to_consent_response(child, Programme.FLU)
        nurse_consent_wizard_page.select_parent(child.parents[0])
        nurse_consent_wizard_page.select_consent_method(ConsentMethod.PHONE)
        nurse_consent_wizard_page.record_parent_positive_consent(
            yes_to_health_questions=False, programme=Programme.FLU
        )
    
        tally_totals[TallyCategory.NO_RESPONSE] -= 1
        tally_totals[TallyCategory.CONSENT_GIVEN_FOR_INJECTION] += 1
        sessions_page.check_all_totals(tally_totals)
    
        sessions_page.click_consent_tab()
        sessions_page.click_child(child)
>       sessions_page.click_response_from_parent(child.parents[0])

    ) -> Any:
        if self._api_zone.get():
